subject: [PATCH v2 1/1] iomap: don't mark folio uptodate if read IO has bytes pending

reviews.author: Darrick J. Wong
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses a real issue with the iomap code. However, it would be nice to add some additional comments to explain why this change is necessary.

2026-03-03.patch_summary: This patch addresses a problem where a folio is marked as uptodate prematurely in the iomap_set_range_uptodate() function, leading to incorrect behavior when the read completion path calls folio_end_read(). The fix involves not marking the folio as uptodate if there are bytes pending from an async IO helper. Instead, the folio uptodate state will be set correctly through the read completion path.
